blended.narrative: Sommet Saint-Sauveur is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 26 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 49°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
